name: opentofu
description: Guarded OpenTofu skills and a local MCP server for policy, immutable planning, evidence, and confirmed apply workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Run safe OpenTofu workflows from local validation to GitOps review.
interface.longDescription: A multi-skill OpenTofu pack with a local Go MCP server for preflight, policy evidence, immutable plans, bounded evidence reads, and single-use confirmed applies.
defaultPrompt: Validate and plan an OpenTofu stack with safety checks.
Run drift and policy checks before an environment change.
Generate a reviewable OpenTofu plan artifact for CI.
